title: The Four Language Pathways
subtitle: A developmental model of language, literacy, and signed-language writing
summary: Opening model paper for the Sutton SignWriting Language and Literacy Research series.
synopsis: This entry defines a research-facing model that distinguishes language input, language output, literacy input, and literacy output. It positions the model against language-acquisition and reading frameworks, states testable expectations, and clarifies how language development, literacy layering, and signed-language writing relate without forcing those questions back into the more public foundations lane.
